title: Just Noticed Something about Gendos Office
display_title: Just Noticed Something about Gendos Office
wikitext:
[]: Just Noticed Something about Gendo's Office             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Thu Sep 23, 2010 3:50 am From the placement of the windows it appears to be neat the top of the pyramid, right under the tip. Specifically, it seems to inhabit the space between the eye and the pyramid in the traditional Eye in the Pyramid symbol. Or at I reading too much into this? I know you guys are the worst people to ask if I'm reading too much into a visual cue, but figured it was worth a shot at least. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Sep 23, 2010 4:10 am I think we've discussed this before, though I can't find the thread. It's obvious enough that I made it into a throwaway in a fic years ago.
